myIntro: Hey there! I’m a front-end developer with 9+ years of experience turning caffeine and code into pixel-perfect UIs. I’ve got an unhealthy obsession with tiny details (yes, the 1px misalignments keep me awake at night). When I’m not building sleek interfaces, I’m probably geeking out over the latest tech or experimenting with new tools. Always up for fresh challenges—check out my work and let’s build something awesome!
